mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (content, user_num, post_id, target_type, target_id, created_at) VALUES ( #{content}, #{userNum}, #{postId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.content, c.user_num AS userNum, c.post_id AS postId, c.target_id AS targetId, c.target_type AS targetType, u.nickname, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY COALESCE(c.target_id, c.comment_id) ASC, c.created_at ASC
